security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none';
